title: Cosmos SDK tendermint.abci.Event Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions for the tendermint.abci.Event module of the Cosmos SDK gRPC-gateway REST API.

items.description: EventAttribute is a single key-value pair, associated with an event.

tendermint.abci.Event.description:
Event allows application developers to attach additional information to
ResponseFinalizeBlock and ResponseCheckTx.
Later, transactions may be queried using these events.
